Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim For Minor - Anthony Moreno
Off Calendar Oct-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on Two Minor's Compromises.
Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Laura Martinez, CSR#11332.

Spencer J. Pahlke, Esq., appearing for and with Petitioner: Mark Moreno, father and guardian ad litem for Minor: Anthony Moreno not present in court.
Order Granting Waiver of appearance by minors on file.
Petitioner sworn and examined.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved for each minor as follows:
Total Settlement: $283,333.33
Attorney's Fees: $65,115.94 payable to Law Firm of Walkup, Melodia, Kelly & Schoenberger
Costs: $13,147.01
A net balance of $205,070.38 to be deposited into a purchased annuity at:
Pacific Life Insurance Company

Payable to the Anthony C. Moreno Minor's Trust:
Commencing 3/1/2017, $850.00 per month for 11 years and 4 months, guaranteed; (final guaranteed payment on 6/1/2028).

Commencing 10/1/2017, $1,000.00 per year for 11 years, guaranteed; (final guaranteed payment on 10/1/2027)

Payable to the Anthony Moreno:
Commencing 7/1/2028, $8000 per year for 4 years, guaranteed; (final guaranteed payment on 7/1/2031)

$10,000.00 payable on 3/9/2033 (age 23), guaranteed.
$23,500.00 payable on 3/9/2035 (age 25), guaranteed.
Total cost of the annuity is $160,409.05 with a guaranteed payout of $192,100.00

Court signed Orders Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into a purchased annuity.
Status Hearing Scheduled on 2/21/2017 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipts for the deposit of money into a purchased annuity.
No appearance is required if the receipts are filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514
prior to Hearing.
